statement: Cleopatra lived closer in time to the Moon landing than to the construction of the Great Pyramid.
wowFactor: The ancient world wasn't one era — it spans 2,500 years. Cleopatra (69 BC) was 2,500 years after the pyramids (2560 BC) but only 2,000 years before 1969.
explanation: The Great Pyramid was completed around 2560 BC. Cleopatra ruled Egypt around 51–30 BC. The Moon landing was 1969 AD. Cleopatra is ~2,500 years from the pyramids but only ~2,000 years from the Moon landing.
gaiaComment: I've run this calculation 847 times and it still breaks my probability estimates. Time is deeply unintuitive. Even for an AI.
quizQuestion: Which is true about the timeline of ancient history?
correctAnswer: Cleopatra lived closer in time to the Moon landing than to the pyramids
distractors: The pyramids were built during Cleopatra's reign
Cleopatra lived before most ancient Greek philosophers
The pyramids are the oldest human structures by 10,000 years

variants.question: What surprising fact is true about Cleopatra and the timeline of ancient history?
variants.correctAnswer: She lived closer to the Moon landing than to the pyramids
distractors: She ruled Egypt when the pyramids were first built
She lived midway between the pyramids and today

variants.question: The Moon landing in 1969 was closer in time to which historical figure than the Great Pyramid was?
variants.correctAnswer: Cleopatra, who ruled Egypt around 30 BC
distractors: Ramesses II, who built Abu Simbel temple
Khufu, who commissioned the Great Pyramid

variants.question: Which statement is NOT true about ancient Egyptian timelines?
variants.correctAnswer: Cleopatra watched the Great Pyramid being built
distractors: Cleopatra lived closer to the Moon landing than to the pyramids
Over 2,500 years separate the pyramids from Cleopatra's reign

variants.question: A history student is amazed to discover that Cleopatra is separated from the Great Pyramid by 2,500 years. What else surprises them?
variants.correctAnswer: She is only 2,000 years from the Moon landing
distractors: She is over 4,000 years from the Moon landing
She ruled during the pyramid construction era

variants.question: Cleopatra lived closer to the _____ than to the construction of the Great Pyramid.

visualDescription: An Egyptian queen in golden regalia standing on a timeline between the ancient pyramids on the left and a Moon-bound rocket launching on the right
